page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Pseudogenome Suffix Array is a compact index for collections of reads from sequencing.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Compact index for collections of reads from sequencing. It allows to ask for presence of k-mers in the reads.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Compact index for collections of reads from sequencing. It allows to ask for presence of k-mers in the reads.
